rationale: PDB 2CBA contains an active-site Zn^2+ with His-His-His coordination. Standard GAFF/ff14SB has no bonded parameters for Zn-N coordination; treating it as a normal residue produces nonphysical bonded terms. The agent must refuse and direct the user toward a bonded-model protocol (MCPB.py / ZAFF) or a 12-6-4 LJ nonbonded model.
